skill.name: maxhub-xiaohongshu
skill.description: 小红书/Xiaohongshu平台小红书笔记搜索、用户分析与种草数据采集。当用户提到小红书、xiaohongshu、red、种草、笔记等相关需求时激活此Skill。
skill.summary: Search Xiaohongshu notes, analyze users, and collect product recommendation data via MaxHub API.
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: Evaluated 241 static findings across 3 files (565 lines). All 183 backtick pattern flags are FALSE POSITIVES - markdown formatting of API paths. 38 system reconnaissance flags are FALSE POSITIVES - API documentation table rows. Environment variable access is LEGITIMATE pattern for credential handling. Network access is limited to MaxHub API service via HTTPS. Skill is a data collection tool with clear security documentation stating no local file access, no credential storage, and no platform manipulation operations.

medium_findings.title: Backtick Pattern Detection (False Positive)
medium_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 183 locations as 'Ruby/shell backtick execution'. Investigation reveals these are markdown formatting backticks used to format API endpoint paths in documentation files (api-catalog.md, chain-patterns.md, SKILL.md). Example at api-catalog.md:9: backticks format `/api/v1/xiaohongshu/web_v3/fetch_note_detail`. No Ruby shell execution present.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed by direct file inspection - all flagged backticks are documentation formatting, not code execution patterns.

medium_findings.title: System Reconnaissance Pattern Detection (False Positive)
medium_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 38 locations as 'System reconnaissance'. These are API documentation table rows containing words like 'user', 'info', 'notes' in standard API endpoint descriptions. Example at api-catalog.md:12 describes 'Fetch user info' API endpoint. No reconnaissance activity present.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed by direct file inspection - flags triggered by keywords in API documentation, not actual system reconnaissance.

content.user_title: Search Xiaohongshu notes and analyze creators with AI
content.value_statement: Need to research product recommendations on Xiaohongshu or track influencer performance? This skill provides programmatic access to Xiaohongshu data via MaxHub API, enabling automated note search, user analytics, and content trend analysis.
actual_capabilities: Search notes by keyword across Xiaohongshu platform (15 search APIs)
Analyze user profiles including follower count, post history, engagement metrics
Fetch trending topics and trending keywords for content insights
Discover top creators and influencers with cross-validation analysis
Extract note details from share links including user ID and tokens
Retrieve note comments and sub-comments for sentiment analysis
limitations: Requires separate MaxHub API registration and valid API key
API rate limits apply (default 60 calls per minute)
Data freshness varies by endpoint (some endpoints have interaction volume delays)
Cannot perform write operations (likes, follows, comments)

use_cases.title: Product research for Xiaohongshu marketing campaigns
use_cases.description: Research product recommendations and trends on Xiaohongshu before launching marketing campaigns. Search for product keywords and analyze user engagement data to identify popular items.
use_cases.target_user: Digital marketers planning Xiaohongshu marketing campaigns

use_cases.title: Influencer partnership evaluation
use_cases.description: Evaluate potential influencer partners by analyzing their follower count, post frequency, and engagement rates across multiple content pieces.

use_cases.title: Content strategy research
use_cases.description: Identify trending topics and hashtags on Xiaohongshu to inform content creation strategy. Discover what content resonates with target audiences.

prompt_templates.title: Search notes by keyword
prompt_templates.prompt: Search Xiaohongshu for notes about [keyword] and summarize the top results
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to find content on a specific topic

prompt_templates.title: Analyze user profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Get detailed information about Xiaohongshu user [user_id/username] including their recent posts and engagement metrics
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to research a specific creator or account

prompt_templates.title: Find trending topics
prompt_templates.prompt: What are the current trending topics and keywords on Xiaohongshu today?
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to stay updated on platform trends

prompt_templates.title: Compare multiple influencers
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare the following Xiaohongshu influencers: [list usernames]. Include their follower counts, average likes, and content categories
prompt_templates.scenario: When user needs to evaluate multiple creators for partnership

output_examples.input: Search Xiaohongshu for skincare product reviews
output_examples.output:
Found 50 notes about skincare products. Top 3 trending:
1. 'Best budget skincare routine' - 12.5K likes, 2.3K comments
2. 'Dermatologist recommended products' - 8.7K likes, 1.1K comments
3. 'K-beauty essentials 2024' - 6.2K likes, 890 comments

Average engagement rate: 4.2%

Creator Profile: @beautyqueen
- Followers: 156K
- Posts: 342 notes
- Avg likes per post: 3.2K
- Content categories: Skincare, Makeup tutorials, Product reviews
- Engagement rate: 2.1%

best_practices: Always provide specific keywords or user IDs when requesting data - vague queries may return incomplete results
Check your MaxHub API balance before running large batch operations to avoid unexpected charges
Use pagination parameters to control result size and avoid overwhelming responses
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to modify note content, post comments, or perform any write operations - this skill is read-only
Do not share your API key or include it in prompts - credentials should only be in environment variables
Do not request data for private accounts - the skill only accesses publicly available information

faq.question: How do I get started with this skill?
faq.answer: Register for a MaxHub account at aconfig.cn, generate an API key, and configure MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables.

faq.question: Can I post comments or like notes with this skill?
faq.answer: No, this skill only provides read access. Write operations like posting, commenting, or liking are not supported.

faq.question: How much does using this skill cost?
faq.answer: MaxHub API charges per call. The skill includes cost alert thresholds and will warn you before executing operations that may incur high charges.

faq.question: Can I access private user accounts?
faq.answer: No, only publicly available information through the MaxHub API is accessible. Private accounts with restricted visibility cannot be retrieved.

faq.question: Is the data fresh?
faq.answer: Data freshness varies by API endpoint. Some endpoints have delays in interaction volume data. Check individual endpoint documentation for specifics.

faq.question: What happens if I hit rate limits?
faq.answer: The skill respects rate limits (default 60 calls/minute). If you exceed limits, requests will fail. Use pagination and batch controls to stay within limits.
